Package com.medilabo.solutions.patient.service

Interface CrudService<T>

Type Parameters:
T - the type of the entity
All Known Implementing Classes:
PatientService
public interface CrudService<T>
Generic service interface for managing entities.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Fraigneau Lucas

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default T
    create(T Object)
    Creates a new entity.
    default void
    delete(T Object)
    Deletes an entity.
    default List<T>

    Retrieves all entities.

    Retrieves an entity by its identifier.
    default T
    update(T Object)
    Creates a new entity.

  • Method Details

    • create

      default T create(T Object) throws Exception
      Creates a new entity.
      Parameters:
      Object - the entity to create
      Returns:
      the created entity
      Throws:
      Exception - if the create operation is not supported

    • findAll

      default List<T> findAll()
      Retrieves all entities.
      Returns:
      a list of all entities
      Throws:
      Exception - if the create operation is not supported

    • findById

      default T findById(int id)
      Retrieves an entity by its identifier.
      Parameters:
      id - the identifier of the entity to retrieve
      Returns:
      the entity with the specified identifier
      Throws:
      Exception - if the create operation is not supported

    • update

      default T update(T Object)
      Creates a new entity.
      Parameters:
      Object - the entity to create
      Returns:
      the created entity
      Throws:
      Exception - if the create operation is not supported

    • delete

      default void delete(T Object)
      Deletes an entity.
      Parameters:
      Object - the entity to delete
      Throws:
      Exception - if the create operation is not supported
